'''Jal Te Gniev''' was an experienced but argumentative [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
===Flying for the Alliance===
{{Quote|One damn mission! One damn '''lucky shot'''!|Jal Te Gniev|<ref name="VQ1" />}}
[[File:JalTeGniev-VQ3cov.png|thumb|left|220px|Gniev in his Rebel flight suit]]
A veteran [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], Jal had flown 31 missions and destroyed 80 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] by the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="VQ1" />

However, he did not participate in the Battle of Yavin due to [[measles]]. His [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] was borrowed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]],<ref name="VQ1" /> while his place in [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] was taken by [[Red Eight/Legends|Red Eight]] [[Bren Quersey/Legends|Bren Quersey]], who was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action.<ref name="EGTW" /> Gniev felt great hatred towards Skywalker because he felt as though he had been denied his rightful glory in destroying the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], especially considering his extensive flight record with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="VQ1" />

While nearly getting into an argument with [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] at the Alliance's [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Base]], a false alarm went off. Jal jumped the gun, rushed to his fighter while drunk and opened the [[S-foils/Legends|S-foils]] too quickly, scraping the wings on the hangar wall, and crashed the fighter into a nearby [[Tree/Legends|tree]]. He was then brought before the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] tried to get Gniev to explain his actions, but Gniev was uncooperative and angrily accepted the council's decision of reassignment to [[Dubrava/Legends|Dubrava]] as a recruiter.<ref name="VQ1" />

===A new assignment===
{{Quote|I'll take Dubrava! Anything's better than one more day of your faces.|Jal Te Gniev to General Dodonna and Alliance High Command|<ref name="VQ1" />}}
While on Dubrava, Gniev made his way to the local [[Unidentified bar (Dubrava)|cantina]] and its array of [[Alcohol/Legends|intoxicating drinks]]. A young [[Dubravan]] named [[Bobek]] found the cantina and requested to join the Alliance. Gniev, drunk, blindfolded Bobek and had him walk into a trap door in the boardwalk, falling into the swampy water below. Humiliated and disillusioned, Bobek left. Also while drunk, Gniev mentioned the name "Skywalker" to [[Nevana]], who, in turn, mentioned it to [[Sarma]]. Soon enough, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces heard of the name and began to seek its source: Gniev. A squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] attacked the cantina and set it ablaze, burning dozens of Dubravans alive.<ref name="VQ2">[[Vader's Quest 2|''Vader's Quest'' 2]]</ref>

Gniev was barely able to escape, but reappeared some distance away, only to encounter a pair of stormtroopers. By chance, Bobek was nearby and killed one of the troopers. The second trooper shot Bobek and was then drowned by Gniev. Bobek admitted to purchasing the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] with the intent to kill Gniev, but used it against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] when the chance arose. With Bobek's death, Gniev reevaluated himself and set out to save Luke Skywalker, whose life he had placed in extreme jeopardy.<ref name="VQ2" />

[[File:GnievSacrifice-VQ.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Gniev sacrifices himself and single-handedly destroys an Interdictor Star Destroyer]]

===Sacrifice===
{{Quote|This one's for you Bobek!|Jal Te Gniev|<ref name="VQ">''[[Star Wars: Vader's Quest]]''</ref>}}
Gniev then acquired a [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] which he flew to [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]] to save Skywalker. Skywalker, meanwhile, had become [[Mission to Jazbina|entangled]] with Lord [[Prepredenko]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Syayna]]. Upon the arrival of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and an [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]] that prevented anyone from fleeing the planet, the situation on Jazbina looked grim. Gniev landed on the planet and joined the efforts of Skywalker and Syayna to save the planet. Using Skywalker's X-wing, Gniev flew into space to attack the ''Interdictor''. Amused, the Imperial [[Captain/Legends|captain]] ordered his crew to lower the shields and release the squadron of TIE fighters, believing the lone fighter was attempting to flee. But Gniev, who intended only to protect his comrades below, simply rushed onward through the emerging TIEs and entered the Interdictor's hangar bay before its crew could raise the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] again. There he released his entire supply of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] into the heart of the warship. He was consumed by the massive explosion of the ''Interdictor'', which crippled the Imperial effort to subdue Jazbina. Gniev's sacrifice, however tragic, saved the day on Jazbina.<ref name="VQ4" /><ref name="VQ2" /><ref name="VQ3">[[Vader's Quest 3|''Vader's Quest'' 3]]</ref>
